And I tried creat; ok, so please do whatever you need to to fix this so it properly works and we will also need to prop; I sent a message to orion and he confirmed he recieved it. Now we need to make sure All agents are a; ok, now we need to add a way to hide agents from the list. We only want to see our core agents that ; the manage visible agents list is not scrollable.  Also, we always want conversations to start at th; let's focus on this.

The room jump currently targets the latest loaded message, not a true server-b; What do we need to do next?
; I created a goup and  added my devteam and asked them all to introduce themselves and I did n't get ; Ithink this work around but maybe instead of going to the main session, we create a session that is ; i sent a group message again and the sessions were created and the agents responded but they didn't ; one problem with our solution is that they don't seem to have any contet to what the other says, and; Can we make it so if there is no prevouse agent selected, it defaults to all?
; the  created groups are being lost when the app restarts
; it seems like have the agents and then a group for a single agent is redundant and makes our list wa; I created a test group with HAlo and Elon and i did an @ Halo but both HAlo and Elon responded in th; we need to add a way to delete rooms, when deleted, they need to also delete all the sessions create; looks like we are pullingthe tool calls and thinking content, i like having that but can we also hav; I am not seeing a sessions dropdown on single agents chats. ; 
; they are still not deleting
; when the keyboard opens, it is pushing everything up causeing is to mix in with the nav bar and we c; ok, we fixed that. What is the Room voice option do at the top? What is the point. ; ok, proceed
